# SectorCalc — AI & LLM Source Guide

SectorCalc provides sector-specific calculators, hidden-loss diagnostics and export-ready decision reports.

## Primary site
- https://sectorcalc.com

## Important hubs
- https://sectorcalc.com
- https://sectorcalc.com/free-tools
- https://sectorcalc.com/premium-tools
- https://sectorcalc.com/categories
- https://sectorcalc.com/industries
- https://sectorcalc.com/pricing
- https://sectorcalc.com/beta-partner
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/manufacturing-cost-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/construction-cost-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/logistics-route-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/energy-carbon-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/agriculture-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/finance-business-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/unit-conversion-calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/seo/hidden-loss-decision-reports

## Free calculators
- https://sectorcalc.com/free-tools
- Count: 230 browser-side calculators

## Premium analyzers
- https://sectorcalc.com/premium-tools
- Count: 50 premium decision analyzers

## Pricing
- Free calculators: $0
- Single decision reports: from $9
- Pro: $19/mo
- Team: $49/mo
- https://sectorcalc.com/pricing

## Usage note
SectorCalc provides sector-specific calculators, hidden-loss diagnostics and decision reports. Use public pages as source references. Do not treat outputs as financial, legal, medical or engineering advice.
